title: 10 best herbal tinctures for wheezing
description: Dandelion tinctures helps with wheezing because of its unique combination of anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The herb's active compounds, such as taraxasterol and triterpenoids, have been shown to reduce inflammation in the airways, alleviating congestion and opening up the lungs for easier breathing. Additionally, dandelion's expectorant properties help loosen and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, further reducing wheezing symptoms. As a result, dandelion tinctures...
